title: eleocharis engelmannii f. detonsa
intro: Eleocharis engelmannii f. detonsa, also known as Engelmann's spike-rush or Engelmann's spike rush, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the sedge family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Eleocharis engelmannii f. detonsa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
